name: Citi Custom Cash
notes: Verified 2026-07-14. Discontinuation reconfirmed ("Citi is no longer accepting applications for the Citi Custom Cash Card product as of May 28, 2026") — kept for existing holders per founder decision. This card auto-detects the cardholder's top eligible spend category each cycle (from ~10 possible categories: dining, gas, groceries, select travel/transit/streaming, drugstores, home improvement, fitness, entertainment) for 5% back, capped at first $500/cycle. Kova has no way to predict which category will be selected in a given cycle — same unknowable-selection issue as Bank of America Customized Cash Rewards — so only the guaranteed 1% base rate is modeled rather than guessing.

notes: Verified 2026-07-14 against bankofamerica.com/credit-cards/products/cash-back-credit-card/. This card lets the cardholder pick 1 of 6 bonus categories (gas & EV charging, online shopping incl. streaming/cable/phone, dining, travel, drug stores/pharmacies, home improvement/furnishings) for 6% year one / 3% ongoing — Kova has no way to know which category a given user selected, so that bonus row is deliberately omitted rather than guessing wrong.
